label: vec_reset_to_boot
notes: Reset vector: DI; JMP 0x0180.

label: vec_ei_reti_stub
notes: Short EI; RETI stub.

label: vec_irq_to_0978
notes: Interrupt/vector stub to 0x0978.

label: vec_irq_to_gate_f000_input_capture
notes: Interrupt/vector stub to 0x0582; 0x0060 also jumps here.

label: vec_irq_to_print_engine_dispatch
notes: Interrupt/vector stub to 0x0668.

label: vec_irq_to_rxb_receive
notes: Interrupt/vector stub to 0x05E2.

label: rom_signature_pbls
notes: Bytes decode as ASCII-like PBLS signature at both 0x0070 and external-check address 0x4000.

label: calt_table_or_fast_services
notes: Dense target area for CALT calls 0x80-0xBE; linear disassembly is not enough to name each entry yet.

label: boot_reset_entry
notes: Initializes SP/MM/V register page, clears RAM/windows, checks external PROM signature, then enters initialization.

label: post_external_prom_boot_init
notes: Boot continuation after optional external PROM check; calls mechanism and DIP/init helpers.

label: startup_sample_gate_f000_status
notes: Boot reads F000 between F2/F1/NMI tests before deriving initial status and switch state.

label: startup_decode_f003_status_bits
notes: Reads F003 and maps active-low bits into VV0A/VV0B startup status fields.

label: init_runtime_state
notes: Clears EE/EF state blocks, seeds print/page pointers, initializes mode variables.

label: init_cpu_ports_timers_gate_array
notes: Writes EOM, PA/PB/PC, MCC/MA/MB/MC, TMM/ETMM, F004, F005, F003.

label: memclear_hl_bc
notes: Stores 0x00 through memory using HL and BC loop.

label: probe_cg_ram_window_set
notes: Calls 0x04B8 with bank-like values 0x80,0x00,0x40 and stores feature flags.

label: probe_8000_window_bank
notes: Uses CALT 0x00B4 then probes 0x8000 window contents.

label: probe_8000_window_pattern
notes: Writes/reads 0x8000 and scans window; likely RAM/CG/bank probe.

label: checksum_8000_page
notes: Sums bytes starting at 0x8000.

label: isr_gate_f000_input_capture_buffer
notes: Reads F000 through the gate-array register window, stores the byte into the EE20 input buffer, restores F002, RETI. Candidate parallel-port data path.

label: isr_rxb_host_receive_buffer
notes: Reads CPU RXB, checks ER, stores received byte into the shared EE20 input buffer while temporarily changing F002.

label: isr_print_engine_dispatch
notes: Large RETI routine dispatching on VV37/VV61 flags; calls motion/print helpers and updates timers.

label: motion_step_dir_a
notes: Updates MB/PC and VV61/VV6C; paired with 0x093E path.

label: motion_step_dir_b
notes: Calls 0x0953/0x095F, updates phase/output helpers 0x54A0/0x54C9/0x5538.

label: shift_phase_left
notes: Shifts VV16 right/left pair with 0x095F and updates PB phase bits via 0x096A.

label: shift_phase_right
notes: Companion to 0x0953; updates PB low phase bits from VV16.

label: isr_timer_transfer_reload
notes: Saves registers, moves three bytes DE<->BC depending VV61, loads ETM0 from ECNT plus EE3A.

label: read_next_host_input_byte
notes: Blocking consumer for the EE20/EE22 input ring: waits for EE1E pending count, reads one byte from EE22 under F002=0xC0, advances EE22, decrements EE1E, and returns byte in A.

label: disable_f001_irq_or_strobe
notes: DI; clears F001 bits with NOP delays; masks MKL; similar sequence appears in interrupt paths.

label: read_next_host_input_byte_7bit
notes: CALT helper for 7-bit command parameters: calls 0x0A0B then masks A with 0x7F.

label: read_next_host_input_word
notes: CALT helper: reads two host input bytes through 0x0A0B and returns them as a 16-bit value in HL.

label: write_bank_register_f002
notes: Single helper: MOV ($F002),A; RET.

label: line_or_buffer_bounds_check
notes: Uses EFBF, EE4C, EE5C/EE5E and comparisons; likely print-buffer bounds logic.

label: scan_ff00_buffer
notes: Scans/copies FF00 buffer; branches to 0x429D when done.

label: set_mode_bit_25_from_calt86
notes: Small mode flag helper, writes VV25 bit 7 then CALT 0x0092.

label: set_mode_bit_23_20_from_calt86
notes: Small mode flag helper, toggles VV23 bit 5 then CALT 0x0092.

label: mode_or_geometry_helper
notes: Called from buffer/geometry routines; returns HL/EA-derived values.

label: common_render_or_buffer_helper
notes: High fan-in CALL target in text/graphics region.

label: load_cg_metrics_from_8000_or_8600
notes: Reads F002, selects 0x8000/0x8600 window, uses CALT 0x00B4 and VV:A0 to load EF99/EF9B metrics.

label: fit_glyph_width_and_update_bitmap_pointers
notes: Compares EF97/EF9B/EE88-derived pointers, adjusts EE88 and EF9B, and normalizes VV99 width/count.

label: save_ee88_then_recompute_glyph_source
notes: Saves EE88 to EE8A, calls 0x1DFE, stores computed source pointer back to EE88, then clears a 0x021C-byte work area.

label: compute_glyph_source_pointer_from_ee88
notes: High fan-in companion to 0x1DDF; starts from EE88 and returns a computed pointer in EA/HL.

label: advance_or_flush_print_buffer
notes: High fan-in output routine; clears VV24 bit 0, checks EF8B/EF8D state, then enters the render/advance path through 0x105A/0x256E.

label: clear_vv24_bit0
notes: Tiny high-fan-in helper: ANIW VV24,0xFE; RET.

label: esc_J_immediate_forward_feed
notes: ESC J handler: reads one byte, builds positive immediate feed distance in HL, and enters shared feed path at 0x2534.

label: esc_j_immediate_reverse_feed_fx80_compat
notes: ESC j compatibility handler: reads one byte, sets H=0x80 for reverse/negative immediate feed, and enters the same 0x2534 path used by ESC J.

label: initialize_print_geometry_state
notes: Called during reset and adjustment-mode initialization.

label: classify_extended_printable_character
notes: Range ladder over 0xAF-0xDE and 0xF4 using RET/RETS as boolean result; used before selecting font/state tables.

label: setup_8000_render_window_state
notes: Seeds EE46/EE48/EE4A/EE4C/EE4E/EE50 around the 0x8000 work window before the main render loop.

label: inline_calt_dispatch_tail_table
notes: Inline byte table reached by 0x2DC8/0x0FC3 dispatch; disassembles as instructions but is table-like tail data before the 0xFF fill.

label: unused_ff_gap_2de3_3fff
notes: Long 0xFF fill from 0x2DE3 through 0x3FFF.

label: external_prom_signature_or_alt_entry
notes: PBLS-like signature at 0x4000; reset compares 0x0070 against 0x4000 to decide external PROM handling.

label: external_prom_entry_candidate
notes: CALL 0x038B then enters the normal 0x400B input/decode loop. May be external-PROM overlay entry or signature-following code.

label: main_input_decode_loop
notes: Top-level host-byte loop: reads one byte via CALT 0x0080/0x0A0B, calls 0x4038, dispatches controls through 0x6944, or continues to printable output when 0x4038 returns with skip.

label: printable_character_output_path
notes: Entry after 0x4038 classifies a byte as printable; prepares glyph/render state before returning to the 0x400B loop.

label: classify_input_character_and_select_style_state
notes: Normalizes bytes through the 0x6000 identity/remap table, selects current/alternate font state into VV21/VV22/VV1F, and returns with skip for printable bytes.

label: check_line_window_bounds
notes: Compares EE4C+HL against EE5C/EE5E bounds; used by character classifier and test print paths.

label: render_glyph_columns_or_3plane_overlay
notes: Glyph bitmap transform path; uses VV99 width, VV:CF stride, EE88/EE8A pointers, and ORs source columns into destination planes.

label: copy_glyph_columns_to_work_buffer
notes: Glyph transform path that copies packed source columns to the EE88 work buffer, then runs shared shift/merge helpers.

label: render_glyph_columns_variant
notes: Variant of the 0x43DD path with additional shifted-column merge steps.

label: or_shifted_columns_left_into_work_buffer
notes: Shared glyph helper; shifts source column data left by VV:D0 and ORs it into the destination stream.

label: or_shifted_columns_right_into_work_buffer
notes: Shared glyph helper; shifts source column data right by VV:D0 and ORs it into the destination stream.

label: xor_or_mask_shifted_columns_into_work_buffer
notes: Shared glyph helper; applies shifted source bytes with XRAX/OR-style masking into the destination stream.

label: adjust_glyph_width_and_right_edge_metrics
notes: Updates VV99 and EF95/EF97/EF9B after widening/extra-column transforms.

label: trim_or_merge_trailing_glyph_columns
notes: Uses EE88 and VV99 to combine trailing bytes with inverted previous-column masks.

label: set_glyph_work_stride_3
notes: Sets VV:CF to 3 and marks VV2A bit 7 when a non-empty glyph is active.

label: set_glyph_work_stride_4
notes: Sets VV:CF to 4 and marks style bits before packed/nibble expansion.

label: clear_or_pad_expanded_glyph_buffer
notes: Uses 0x1DFE and VV99 to copy/zero expanded glyph columns, then updates EE88 and EF9B.

label: double_or_widen_glyph_columns
notes: Clears a derived work span, duplicates 3-byte columns, and adjusts EF9B; likely double-width or widening support.

label: expand_packed_glyph_by_style_flags
notes: Selects one of several packed-column extraction paths based on VV89 bits and writes expanded bytes through 0x49AD.

label: expand_high_nibble_to_2bit_pairs
notes: Maps input bits 0x80/0x40/0x20/0x10 to output masks 0xC0/0x30/0x0C/0x03; used heavily by packed glyph expansion.

label: condense_or_mask_glyph_columns
notes: Halves/condenses active glyph columns with inverted masks, then updates width and EF95/EF97/EF9B metrics.

label: copy_2byte_glyph_columns_to_3byte_work_rows
notes: Copies two source bytes plus zero padding, or zero plus two source bytes depending VV28 bit 3.

label: write_packed_glyph_nibbles_to_work_buffer
notes: Writes packed nibble/bit groups into destination columns at offsets 0/3/6/9; used for narrow packed glyph paths.

label: gate_array_f001_control_cluster
notes: Cluster of helpers that set/clear F001 bits and related VV flags.

label: clear_f001_bit3
notes: DI; read F001; ANI 0xF7; write F001; clears VV0A bit 0x10.

label: set_f001_bit3
notes: DI; read F001; ORI 0x08; write F001; sets VV0A bit 0x10.

label: txb_send_byte_wait_fst
notes: Waits SKIT FST then writes TXB.

label: read_panel_buttons_debounced
notes: Combines stable PC bits from 0x4EF9 with the 0x4F21 PC08/F2 path; bidirectional-adjustment mode treats return bits 0x01/0x02/0x04 as panel actions.

label: read_pc_bits_30_stable
notes: Debounces PC & 0x30 and maps them to return bits 0x02 and 0x01.

label: sample_panel_pc08_or_f2_button
notes: Uses SKIT F2 plus a PC bit 0x08 wait loop; returns with/without caller skip so 0x4EEA can set panel-action bit 0x04.

label: delay_03e8
notes: BC=0x03E8 delay via CALT 0x0090.

label: read_dip_switches_and_panel_pa_bits
notes: Calls table-driven ADC switch reader 0x4F54 twice, stores VV00/VV01, then folds PA bits 0x04/0x08 into VV01.

label: read_adc_switch_table_bits
notes: Walks compact tables at 0x4F96/0x4F9F, selects F002/ANM modes through 0x508D, and builds one switch bit per threshold comparison.

label: sample_vr_adjustment_adc_offsets
notes: Startup and bidirectional-adjustment sampler; averages ADC channels, stores signed offsets at EE28/EE2E-related slots, and clamps them to small ranges.

label: average_adc_sample_127_times
notes: Calls 0x508D 0x7F times for the selected F002/ANM mode and returns the averaged sample.

label: write_f002_select_adc_average_cr0_cr3
notes: Writes F002 from A, configures ANM from B, waits FAD, then averages CR0-CR3 into one ADC value.

label: write_gate_array_f003_from_vv15
notes: Stores A to VV15 and F003.

label: mechanism_output_state_dispatch
notes: Maps VV37 flags to EFxx state bytes and a jump table at 0x7007; updates PA/PB outputs.

label: unused_ff_gap_5794_5fff
notes: Long 0xFF fill from 0x5794 through 0x5FFF.

label: byte_identity_table_00_ff
notes: Full 0x00-0xFF byte table.

label: selftest_and_menu_strings
notes: String/data block: L5217B, Data Dump Mode, CSF messages, DIP-switch/menu text.

label: dip_menu_fixed_width_strings
notes: FF-delimited fixed-width menu strings for DIP-switch printout.

label: character_set_or_translation_tables
notes: Non-code tables after menu strings; includes visible character-set fragments.

label: dispatch_control_or_esc_command
notes: Command-table dispatcher. Pushes 0x400B as the loop return, scans byte/target tables, and jumps to matched command handlers.

label: dispatch_esc_command_after_esc
notes: ESC handler from the primary table: reads the next byte with 0x0AB2 and dispatches through the ESC table at 0x699C.

label: primary_control_command_table
notes: Count-prefixed table of 14 primary nonprintable commands: ESC, LF, CR, BEL, BS, HT, VT, FF, SO, SI, DC2, DC3, DC4, CAN.

label: esc_command_table
notes: Count-prefixed table of 62 ESC command bytes and handler addresses, including ESC @, ESC J, ESC K/L/Y/Z, ESC U, ESC C, ESC N/O, and style commands.

label: unused_ff_gap_6a5a_6fff
notes: Long 0xFF fill from 0x6A5A through 0x6FFF.

label: mechanism_output_jump_table
notes: Jump table consumed by 0x540D after indexing from EFxx state byte.

label: cr0_lookup_table
notes: Indexed from ISR at 0x06DF using CR0 range 0xC1-0xEE.

label: service_or_mode_entry
notes: Reachable from 0x0385; exact mode unknown.

label: data_dump_grid_printer
notes: Prints rows through the 0x8000 work window, converts nibbles to ASCII, and emits dot placeholders via 0x4038/0x2011.

label: nibble_to_ascii_hex_digit
notes: Converts 0-15 to ASCII hex digit using +7/+0x30 adjustment.

label: print_hex_digit_or_data_dump_cell
notes: Saves HL to EE46, prints one cell through 0x4038, advances by seven bytes, and restores registers.

label: select_print_state_for_character
notes: Selects current/alternate font state into VV21/VV22 based on character range, then checks bounds via 0x4173.

label: print_ff_or_nul_terminated_string
notes: Prints bytes from HL until 0x00/0xFF, using A/C mode and char-output helpers.

label: print_string_then_output_advance
notes: Calls 0x755D then jumps to 0x2011.

label: copy_string_to_ff00_then_print
notes: Copies a source string to 0xFF00 then prints via 0x755D.

label: data_dump_mode_routine
notes: Prints strings at 0x6116/0x612E/0x613C/0x615E; handles data-dump paper length flow.

label: bidirectional_adjustment_mode
notes: Prints 0x7A18 'Bi-d Adjustment Mode', VR strings, reads panel/sensor input.

label: bidirectional_adjustment_strings
notes: FF-delimited strings: Bi-d Adjustment Mode, VR1, VR2, out of range.

label: update_panel_select_pa_pb_outputs
notes: Writes PA bit 0 and PB bit 7 depending VV23/VVA5; used during service/adjustment UI setup.

label: unused_ff_gap_7b74_7fff
notes: Long 0xFF fill from 0x7B74 through end of ROM.
